data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recovery campaign triggers.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push), but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding these triggers. While the linked use case mentions the need for recovery campaign triggers, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate their implementation or validation. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push) validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the recovery campaign triggers.
